---
title: "Tunnel to Pinehurst w/ Joaquin Miller Descent"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="MacArthur" data-miles="25.09" data-elevation="3424.21">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-jm/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>MacArthur</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>25.09</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>3424.21 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br>70%</p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-jm/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Mellow</td>
      <td>16.87</td>
      <td>67.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>3.75</td>
      <td>15.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>1.92</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.90</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Danger Zone</td>
      <td>0.66</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Climb Chunks

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-jm/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Workout</th>
      <th>Road</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>25.2</td>
      <td>173 ± 67</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.7</td>
      <td>9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Tunnel Road</td>
      <td>5.1</td>
      <td>48 ± 24</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>5.7</td>
      <td>34</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Pinehurst Road</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
      <td>12 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (easy)</td>
      <td>Redwood Road</td>
      <td>3.2</td>
      <td>25 ± 10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.2</td>
      <td>11</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Mountain Boulevard</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>6 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Broadway Terrace</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.7</td>
      <td>14</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-pinehurst-loop-jm/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>7.5</td>
      <td>29.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>6.0</td>
      <td>23.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>4.9</td>
      <td>19.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>4.5</td>
      <td>17.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>3.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>2.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::
